source_title: Introducing the irruption theory of consciousness by Tom Froese
reference_text: It's something that hasn't been published yet, so it's work in progress, and I'm just going to put it out here for some discussion.
notes: Reference clip extracted from reviewed public YouTube lecture audio and cleaned with the standard lecture_cleanup filter. Current reference is sub-12 seconds to avoid F5 prompt truncation. Previous local interview-source reference remains in AudioTranscription/references/Issue07_Froese_Koroma/ for comparison.

rejected_reference_candidates.reason: Ended on 'consciousness', which leaked into the first-minute ASR of the full Issue07 render.
Fourteen-second reference exceeded F5's safe prompt length and ended with extra prompt-tail text beyond the new sentence-bounded clip.
